name: playwright-automation
description: Playwright automation skeleton project - This file defines WHAT your project needs and HOW to run it (Project Identity + Dependencies + Scripts)

_dependencyNotes.@playwright/test: Core Playwright testing framework - provides test runner, assertions, browser automation
_dependencyNotes.@types/node: TypeScript type definitions for Node.js - enables IntelliSense and type checking
_dependencyNotes.allure-commandline: CLI tool to generate Allure reports - converts allure-results into visual HTML report
_dependencyNotes.allure-playwright: Connects Playwright to Allure reporting - captures test steps, screenshots, attachments
_dependencyNotes.dotenv: Loads .env file variables (QASE_API_TOKEN, QASE_PROJECT_CODE) into process.env
_dependencyNotes.playwright-qase-reporter: Sends test results to Qase.io platform - maps test IDs to Qase test cases

_scriptNotes.test: Runs ALL tests in tests/specs folder
_scriptNotes.test:e2e: Runs only the E2E Module Flow test
_scriptNotes.test:rainy: Runs rainyDayParent login test with list + allure reporters
_scriptNotes.test:report: Runs all tests and generates HTML report in playwright-report/
_scriptNotes.allure:generate: Creates Allure HTML report from allure-results folder
_scriptNotes.allure:open: Opens the generated Allure report in browser
_scriptNotes.allure:serve: Starts a local server to view Allure results live

scripts.test:report: npx playwright test --reporter=html && echo 'Report ready: playwright-report/index.html'
